# Novalis

*1772 – 1801 · German · [Romanticism](../movements/romanticism.md)*

Poet and thinker of early German Romanticism (real name Friedrich von Hardenberg): he dreams of « romanticizing » the world to give it back its magic and makes night, dream and inwardness the paths toward the infinite.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
